title: 10 health benefits of Crataegus oxyacantha (hawthorn)
intro: Crataegus oxyacantha has health benefits such as reducing cholesterol levels, improving blood flow to the heart, and lowering blood pressure. The medicinal properties of hawthorn include flavonoids, oligomeric proanthocyanidins, and triterpenic acids, which contribute to its cardiovascular protective effects. By taking hawthorn supplements or consuming it as a tea, individuals can potentially reduce their risk of heart disease, improve circulation, and alleviate symptoms of angina and congestive heart failure, ultimately improving overall cardiac health and quality of life.
